ddls:
CREATE TABLE "sessions" (
  "session_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each congressional session */,
  "congress_number" INTEGER /* Number of the Congress (e.g., 115th Congress) */,
  "year" INTEGER /* Year the session started */,
  "session_number" INTEGER /* Number of the session within the Congress (e.g., 1st session, 2nd session) */,
  "start_date" TEXT /* Date the session started */,
  "end_date" TEXT /* Date the session ended */,
  "session_type" TEXT /* Type of session (e.g., regular, special) */,
  "session_status" TEXT /* Current status of the session (e.g., in progress, adjourned, recess) */,
  "presiding_officer" TEXT /* Name of the presiding officer during the session */,
  "location" TEXT /* Location where the session took place */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("session_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "votes" (
  "vote_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each vote */,
  "session_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the session in which the vote occurred */,
  "vote_number" INTEGER /* Number of the vote within the session */,
  "yeas" INTEGER /* Number of yeas (votes in favor) */,
  "nays" INTEGER /* Number of nays (votes against) */,
  "vote_date" TEXT /* Date the vote took place */,
  "vote_type" TEXT /* Type of vote (e.g., roll call, voice vote) */,
  "vote_status" TEXT /* Status of the vote (e.g., passed, failed, pending) */,
  "vote_description" TEXT /* Brief description of the vote */,
  "bill_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the bill or resolution associated with the vote */,
  "amendment_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the amendment associated with the vote */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("vote_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_votes_session_id FOREIGN KEY ("session_id") REFERENCES sessions ("session_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_votes_amendment_id FOREIGN KEY ("amendment_id") REFERENCES amendments ("amendment_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_votes_bill_id FOREIGN KEY ("bill_id") REFERENCES bills ("bill_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "vote_questions" (
  "question_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each vote question */,
  "vote_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the vote the question is associated with */,
  "question_text" TEXT /* Text of the question or motion being voted on */,
  "question_type" TEXT /* Type of question (e.g., motion to proceed, amendment) */,
  "question_status" TEXT /* Status of the question (e.g., adopted, rejected) */,
  "related_bill_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the bill or resolution related to the question */,
  "related_amendment_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the amendment related to the question */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("question_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_vote_questions_related_bill_id FOREIGN KEY ("related_bill_id") REFERENCES bills ("bill_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_vote_questions_related_amendment_id FOREIGN KEY ("related_amendment_id") REFERENCES amendments ("amendment_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_vote_questions_vote_id FOREIGN KEY ("vote_id") REFERENCES votes ("vote_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "bills" (
  "bill_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each bill or resolution */,
  "bill_number" TEXT /* Number of the bill or resolution (e.g., S.Con.Res. 3) */,
  "bill_title" TEXT /* Title of the bill or resolution */,
  "introduced_date" TEXT /* Date the bill or resolution was introduced */,
  "sponsors" TEXT /* List of sponsors of the bill or resolution */,
  "bill_status" TEXT /* Status of the bill (e.g., introduced, passed, vetoed) */,
  "last_updated_date" TEXT /* Date the bill was last updated */,
  "committee" TEXT /* Committee(s) to which the bill has been referred */,
  "cosponsors" TEXT /* List of cosponsors of the bill */,
  "summary" TEXT /* Summary of the bill */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("bill_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "amendments" (
  "amendment_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each amendment */,
  "bill_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the bill or resolution the amendment is associated with */,
  "amendment_number" TEXT /* Number of the amendment (e.g., Amdt. No. 8) */,
  "amendment_text" TEXT /* Text of the amendment */,
  "proposed_date" TEXT /* Date the amendment was proposed */,
  "amendment_status" TEXT /* Status of the amendment (e.g., adopted, rejected) */,
  "last_updated_date" TEXT /* Date the amendment was last updated */,
  "proposed_by" TEXT /* Name of the person who proposed the amendment */,
  "committee" TEXT /* Committee to which the amendment has been referred */,
  "summary" TEXT /* Summary of the amendment */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("amendment_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_amendments_bill_id FOREIGN KEY ("bill_id") REFERENCES bills ("bill_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "user_name" TEXT /* Full name of the user */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the user */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the user (e.g., researcher, analyst, admin) */,
  "phone" TEXT /* Phone number of the user */,
  "department" TEXT /* Department or division the user belongs to */,
  "access_level" TEXT /* Access level of the user (e.g., read-only, read-write) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "access_logs" (
  "access_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each access event */,
  "vote_id" INTEGER /* ID of the vote being accessed */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user accessing the vote */,
  "access_date" TEXT /* Date when the vote was accessed */,
  "access_type" TEXT /* Type of access (e.g., view, download) */,
  "ip_address" TEXT /* IP address of the user accessing the system */,
  "user_agent" TEXT /* User agent string of the user's browser */,
  "duration" INTEGER /* Duration of the access event in seconds */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("access_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_access_logs_vote_id FOREIGN KEY ("vote_id") REFERENCES votes ("vote_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_access_logs_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)
